description: tripsage-ai-class regression-guard. Route uses `withApiGuards({auth:true,...})(handler)` HOC wrapper that enforces auth INSIDE the wrapper before invoking the handler. Pre-v0.17.7 auth-enforcer regex set didn't recognize this HOC family, producing 71+ HIGH-severity FPs on every modern Next.js codebase using a curried auth-guard factory. After F-AUTH-2 the scanner recognizes the HOC family. auth-enforcer MUST NOT fire CWE-306.
